description: Bitbucket Cloud is Atlassian’s hosted source code collaboration service for Git repositories, pull requests, pipelines, and related developer workflows. It provides repository, user, webhook, and workspace features for teams building and reviewing software.
summary: Bitbucket Cloud exposes a REST API at https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0 with multiple auth modes (OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens, app passwords/basic auth, repository/project/workspace access tokens, and JWT for Connect addon endpoints); no separate GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
